notes: Christian bishop of Milan, successor to Ambrose, known for his learning and role in the conversion of Marius Victorinus.

docs.title: Letter 67
docs.author: Ambrose of Milan
docs.excerpt: The Church needs men like you — learned enough to engage the philosophers, humble enough to lead them to Christ. Farewell.

docs.title: Letter 91
docs.author: Ambrose of Milan
docs.excerpt: What remains? Simplicianus [the learned priest who would succeed Ambrose as bishop of Milan; he was the spiritual father of both Marius Victorinus and Augustine] will succeed me. He is a better man than I — wiser, holier, and more patient. The church of Milan will be in good hands.
